scope: software-facing bookkeeping near the A1-to-A2 transition
non_claims: The prototype does not run at A0 or simulate unresolved reality.
The prototype does not prove PAL or ZSA.
ZSA-related concepts remain attributed and scoped as in A0 Boundary Kernel v0.8.2.
A terminal status or successful receipt does not create external authority.
Rule presence does not create authority; rule adoption and actor authority are checked separately.
The prototype performs no autonomous external action.
